profile.name: Kris
profile.title: Automation & Backend Systems
profile.metaDescription: Automation Engineer portfolio focused on API integrations, n8n, GoHighLevel, Discord bots, and backend systems.

hero.eyebrow: Automation Engineer | API Integrations | GoHighLevel | n8n
hero.title: I build backend systems that remove manual work and keep online businesses moving.
hero.subtitle: I design automations, connect APIs, build Discord systems, and create backend workflows that reduce manual work for e-commerce teams, online communities, and service businesses.

about.title: Backend automation for operators who need speed, reliability, and clean workflows.
about.body: I help businesses connect their tools, automate repetitive tasks, and build systems that can run without constant manual checking. My work is focused on practical execution: Discord bot infrastructure, workflow automation, API connections, SMS/CRM automations, and internal tools for online businesses.

services.title: n8n Workflow Automation
services.description: Build automated workflows for lead routing, notifications, data syncing, reporting, and internal operations.

services.title: API & Webhook Integrations
services.description: Connect apps together using APIs, webhooks, custom payloads, and backend logic.

services.title: Discord Bot Systems
services.description: Create and maintain Discord bots for announcements, monitoring, slash commands, role workflows, and community operations.

services.title: GoHighLevel Automation
services.description: Set up GHL workflows, SMS/email automations, forms, funnels, pipelines, and customer follow-up systems.

services.title: Server Setup & Bot Hosting
services.description: Deploy bots on cloud servers, configure auto-restart, manage environment variables, and keep systems running.

services.title: Internal Tools & Dashboards
services.description: Create lightweight dashboards, admin tools, and structured pages that make operations easier to manage.

projects.title: Discord Automation Bot Stack
projects.description: A bot setup for community announcements, role-based alerts, slash commands, and automated operational posting.

projects.title: GHL + SMS Automation Workflow
projects.description: A CRM workflow system for opt-ins, customer replies, failed billing follow-ups, and segmented notifications.

projects.title: n8n API Operations Hub
projects.description: Automated workflows that move data between tools, trigger alerts, clean payloads, and reduce manual admin work.

projects.title: Framer Landing Page + Embedded Tools
projects.description: Website and embedded tool setup for forms, SMS links, opt-in pages, and tracking workflows.

contact.title: Need a system built or fixed?
contact.body: Send me what you are trying to automate, what tools you use, and where the manual work is slowing you down. I can help map the workflow and build the backend system around it.
